title: Korean Flaxseed Pancakes
description: Crunchy and savory on the outside, fluffy and indulgent on the inside, these Korean flaxseed pancakes make for a satisfying breakfast or snack.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine flaxseed, salty, velvety, indulgent and korean.
Add stir and mix until smooth.
Gradually add fry and mix until a batter forms.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Drop the batter by the tablespoonful onto the pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip and cook for another 2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
